languages.text: "Вот вам последний урок, юная особа: сейчас на Даргонус могли бы ступить лишь Гапраки-Олвены. Хотя… мертвецам не пристало являться ко двору. Стража!" {n}Окружившие вас солдаты не оставляют шанса на победу. Последнее, что вы слышите, — сухой щелчок бусины в четках Камиллы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Вот вам последний урок, юная особа: сейчас на Даргонус могли бы ступить лишь Гапраки-Олвены. Хотя… мертвецам не пристало являться ко двору. Стража!" {n}Окружившие вас солдаты не оставляют шанса на победу. Последнее, что вы слышите, — сухой щелчок бусины в четках Камиллы.{/n}

languages.text: "Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Вот вам последний урок, юная особа: сейчас на Даргонус могли бы ступить лишь Гапраки-Олвены. Хотя… мертвецам не пристало являться ко двору. Стража!" {n}Окружившие вас солдаты не оставляют шанса на победу. Последнее, что вы слышите, — сухой щелчок бусины в четках Камиллы.{/n}

Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}

"Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}

"Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}

languages.text: “最后给你上一课吧，年轻人。眼下能踏足达戈努斯的，只有贾帕克-奥尔文一脉的人。不过嘛……死人跑到宫廷里来，可不太体面。卫兵！”{n}围上来的士兵让你彻底失去胜算。你最后听到的，是卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔指间拨过念珠发出的一声干涩轻响。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “最后给你上一课吧，年轻人。眼下能踏足达戈努斯的，只有贾帕克-奥尔文一脉的人。不过嘛……死人跑到宫廷里来，可不太体面。卫兵！”{n}围上来的士兵让你彻底失去胜算。你最后听到的，是卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔指间拨过念珠发出的一声干涩轻响。{/n}

languages.text: « Voici une dernière leçon, jeune {mf|homme|femme} : seule une personne de la lignée des Gaprak-Olwen pourrait mettre les pieds sur Dargonus en ce moment, mais... il serait fâcheux de voir des morts se présenter à la cour. Gardes ! » {n}Les soldats qui vous encerclent ne vous laissent aucun espoir de victoire. La dernière chose que vous entendez est le cliquetis sec d'un grain de chapelet entre les doigts de Camilla Drivestem.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Voici une dernière leçon, jeune {mf|homme|femme} : seule une personne de la lignée des Gaprak-Olwen pourrait mettre les pieds sur Dargonus en ce moment, mais... il serait fâcheux de voir des morts se présenter à la cour. Gardes ! » {n}Les soldats qui vous encerclent ne vous laissent aucun espoir de victoire. La dernière chose que vous entendez est le cliquetis sec d'un grain de chapelet entre les doigts de Camilla Drivestem.{/n}

languages.text: "Son bir ders genç {mf|adam|hanım}... Şu anda Dargonus'a ancak Gaprak-Olwenlerden biri ayak basabilir. Gerçi... Ölülerin saraya gelmesi pek uygunsuz. Muhafızlar!" {n}Etrafını saran askerler, zafer umudunu alıp götürüyor. Duyduğun son şey, Camilla Drivestem'in parmakları arasındaki hareket eden tespihin kuru tıkırtısı oluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Son bir ders genç {mf|adam|hanım}... Şu anda Dargonus'a ancak Gaprak-Olwenlerden biri ayak basabilir. Gerçi... Ölülerin saraya gelmesi pek uygunsuz. Muhafızlar!" {n}Etrafını saran askerler, zafer umudunu alıp götürüyor. Duyduğun son şey, Camilla Drivestem'in parmakları arasındaki hareket eden tespihin kuru tıkırtısı oluyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Le daré una última lección, jovencit{mf|o|a}: solo un miembro de los Gaprak-Olwen podría llegar a Dargonus en estos momentos. Aunque... no es propio de los muertos venir a la corte. ¡Guardias!». {n}Los soldados que te rodean no te dejan escapatoria. Lo último que oyes es el chasquido de una cuenta entre los dedos de Camilla Drivestem.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Le daré una última lección, jovencit{mf|o|a}: solo un miembro de los Gaprak-Olwen podría llegar a Dargonus en estos momentos. Aunque... no es propio de los muertos venir a la corte. ¡Guardias!». {n}Los soldados que te rodean no te dejan escapatoria. Lo último que oyes es el chasquido de una cuenta entre los dedos de Camilla Drivestem.{/n}

languages.text: "Hier kommt eine letzte Lektion, {mf|junger Freund|meine Liebe}: Derzeit könnte nur ein Mitglied der Gaprak-Olwens einen Fuß auf Dargonus setzen. Allerdings ... ist es ausgesprochen ungebührlich, dass die Toten an den Hof kommen. Wachen!" {n}Die Soldaten, die dich umringen, lassen dir keine Chance. Das Letzte, was du hörst, ist das Klicken einer Perle zwischen Camilla Drivestems Fingern.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Hier kommt eine letzte Lektion, {mf|junger Freund|meine Liebe}: Derzeit könnte nur ein Mitglied der Gaprak-Olwens einen Fuß auf Dargonus setzen. Allerdings ... ist es ausgesprochen ungebührlich, dass die Toten an den Hof kommen. Wachen!" {n}Die Soldaten, die dich umringen, lassen dir keine Chance. Das Letzte, was du hörst, ist das Klicken einer Perle zwischen Camilla Drivestems Fingern.{/n}

languages.text: 「最後に、君に教えることがある。今のところ、ドラゴンスに足を踏み入れるのは、ギャプラク・オルウェンズの者のみである。とはいえ…死者が宮廷に来るのは、あまりに不適切だ。警備隊！」{n}君を取り囲む兵士たちは、勝利の望みを断つ。最後に耳にするのは、カミラ・ドライブステムの指の間で乾いた珠の音がする。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Here is one last lesson for you, young {mf|fellow|lady}: only a member of the Gaprak-Olwens could set foot on Dargonus at present. Although... it is rather unseemly for the dead to come to court. Guards!" {n}The soldiers who surround you leave no hope of victory. The last thing you hear is the dry click of a bead between Camilla Drivestem's fingers.{/n}
